items.name_en: Counter-verified【Top-tier Original】M81537 Green Suit Wallet Series
items.name_cn:
Counter-verified【Top-tier Original】M81537 Green Suit Wallet Series
Suit wallet with cowhide leather trim. LV is renowned for its exquisite craftsmanship, combining rare designs and special leathers with innovative technology and classic styles. The Monogram green leather suit wallet highlights the presence of the Louis Vuitton world. The wallet features a unique interior design with various pockets and credit card slots.
Size: 19×10 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier Original M63801 Wavy Black. As a card case, it is really usable. The design is simple, atmospheric, and stylish, with excellent capacity. It gives a professional and steady impression when presenting your business card! With the development of the digital era, cash and bank cards are carried less, and small wallets are increasingly favored! This wallet is unbeatable as a small wallet; it can hold bank cards and bills without any issues. Compact and space-saving, it is convenient for daily bag use or carrying on your person. A classic style that is popular and timeless, looking good in anyone's hands! Dimensions: 10.8 x 8 x 1cm
